claim_text: Forphantomstudies,wecomparedTRvaluesof155,200, 283, and 350 ms with Ernst angle RF excitation for natural abundancedeuterium(flipanglesof52,56,64and69degrees respectively) to our baseline of 350 ms TR, 90 degree flip angle acquisition.
